description: Style NoteStylish and uber cool, these semi-formal boots with a pointed toe design from red tape add an extra bounce to your step. With a high quality leather upper and slip-on style, they are easy to wear and take off. Team this pair with jeans, chinos or even formal trousers for that casual comfort.Product DetailsBlack slip-on with leather upper and pointed toe designElasticated gussets on the sides of the tonguePadded tongue and innerUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear cleanDo not store under sunlight
